# Orekit 12.2 BatchLSEstimator (Levenberg-Marquardt) + KalmanEstimator reference
# for kshana batch & sequential orbit determination. Oracle: Orekit 12.2
# (CS GROUP, Apache-2.0) + Hipparchus 3.1, OpenJDK 21. Generated by OrekitOd.java.
# Dynamics: two-body + J2 only in GCRF, fixed-step classical RK4 (dt). Stations:
# fixed inertial points. Range: instantaneous geometric distance (no light-time).
# These match kshana::orbit_determination byte-for-byte, isolating the estimator.
#
# Record format (one block per scenario):
#   SCEN name | dt | nBatch | nSeq | sigma | nStations
#   TRUTH rx,ry,rz,vx,vy,vz
#   STATION i | sx,sy,sz                       (i = 0..nStations-1)
#   RANGE_BATCH k | r0,r1,...                  (k = 1..nBatch, one range per station)
#   RANGE_SEQ   k | r0,r1,...                  (k = 1..nSeq,   one range per station)
#   OREKIT_BATCH rx,ry,rz,vx,vy,vz | rmsResidual   (recovered EPOCH state)
#   OREKIT_SEQ_EPOCH rx,ry,rz,vx,vy,vz             (Kalman recovered epoch state)
#   OREKIT_SEQ_FINAL rx,ry,rz,vx,vy,vz             (epoch state propagated to last epoch)
# Units: m, s, m/s. Reproduce: see header of OrekitOd.java.
